title: An Act to Expand Local Revenues by Including Meals and Lodging Sales Tax Revenue Under the State-Municipal Revenue Sharing Program
final_disposition: Ought Not to Pass Pursuant To Joint Rule 310, Mar 20, 2025
last_house_action: 1/28/2025 - Committee on Taxation suggested and ordered printed. The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on TAXATION . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
last_senate_action: 3/20/2025 - Pursuant to Joint Rule 310.3 Placed in Legislative Files (DEAD)
